'''鈭歸-m-w-th''' ('''kawamwethoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:chain|chain]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-m-w-th
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chain|chain]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-m-w-th
|-
! Lemma
| kawamwethoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwamwethoko|thiwamwethoko]] || [[word:jiwamwethoko|jiwamwethoko]] || [[word:shiwamwethoko|shiwamwethoko]] || [[word:kiwamwethoko|kiwamwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwamwethoko|thuthuwamwethoko]] || [[word:jujuwamwethoko|jujuwamwethoko]] || [[word:shushuwamwethoko|shushuwamwethoko]] || [[word:kukuwamwethoko|kukuwamwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwamwethoko|thuwamwethoko]] || [[word:juwamwethoko|juwamwethoko]] || [[word:shuwamwethoko|shuwamwethoko]] || [[word:kuwamwethoko|kuwamwethoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwamwethoko|thuwamwethoko]] || [[word:juwamwethoko|juwamwethoko]] || [[word:shuwamwethoko|shuwamwethoko]] || [[word:kuwamwethoko|kuwamwethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowamwethoko|thothowamwethoko]] || [[word:jojowamwethoko|jojowamwethoko]] || [[word:shoshowamwethoko|shoshowamwethoko]] || [[word:kokowamwethoko|kokowamwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowamwethoko|thowamwethoko]] || [[word:jowamwethoko|jowamwethoko]] || [[word:showamwethoko|showamwethoko]] || [[word:kowamwethoko|kowamwethoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowamwethoko|thowamwethoko]] || [[word:jowamwethoko|jowamwethoko]] || [[word:showamwethoko|showamwethoko]] || [[word:kowamwethoko|kowamwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙wamwethoko|th忙wamwethoko]] || [[word:j忙wamwethoko|j忙wamwethoko]] || [[word:sh忙wamwethoko|sh忙wamwethoko]] || [[word:k忙wamwethoko|k忙wamwethoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawamwethoko|thathawamwethoko]] || [[word:jajawamwethoko|jajawamwethoko]] || [[word:shashawamwethoko|shashawamwethoko]] || [[word:kakawamwethoko|kakawamwethoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawamwethoko|thawamwethoko]] || [[word:jawamwethoko|jawamwethoko]] || [[word:shawamwethoko|shawamwethoko]] || [[word:kawamwethoko|kawamwethoko]]

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
